title: Sales Analytics
shortSummary: Numbers tell the story of your sales performance. Learn pipeline metrics, conversion rates, forecast accuracy, and how to use data to improve your results.
whyItMatters: Top-performing AEs are data-literate. They do not just feel like they are having a good quarter; they know their numbers cold. Understanding conversion rates, average deal size, sales cycle length, self-sourced pipeline, and forecast variance lets you diagnose problems early, focus on high-impact activities, and forecast accurately. Your manager expects this; your VP demands it.
coreConcepts: Key sales metrics: win rate, ACV, pipeline coverage, cycle length, and new ARR
Forecasting: commit, upside, best case, and variance to actuals
Sales velocity equation and how to improve each variable
Reading expansion and retention signals alongside new business
